---
title: "[FILL: Title of the paper]"
subtitle: "[FILL: Subtitle of the paper]"

author:
  - name: "[FILL: Author One]"
    affiliations:
      - name: "[FILL: University]"
        city: "[FILL: City]"
        country: "[FILL: Country]"
    orcid: "[FILL: 0000-0000-0000-0000]"
    email: "[FILL: email@example.com]"
    corresponding: true
  - name: "[FILL: Author Two]"
    affiliations:
      - name: "[FILL: University]"
        city: "[FILL: City]"
        country: "[FILL: Country]"
    orcid: "[FILL: 0000-0000-0000-0000]"

abstract: |
  [FILL: Write your abstract here. Summarize the research question, methods, key findings, and implications.]

keywords:
  - "[FILL: keyword 1]"
  - "[FILL: keyword 2]"
  - "[FILL: keyword 3]"

date: today

bibliography: references.bib
---

## Introduction {#sec-introduction}

[FILL: Motivate the research question. Why does this topic matter?]

[FILL: State the objectives and methods used.]

[FILL: Preview the main results.]

[FILL: Describe the contribution of this paper.]

The rest of this article is organized as follows.
@sec-literature provides an overview of the related literature.
@sec-data introduces the data and methods.
@sec-results presents the results and discussion.
Finally, @sec-conclusion offers some concluding remarks.

## Related literature {#sec-literature}

[FILL: Review the relevant literature and position your contribution.]

## Data and methods {#sec-data}

[FILL: Describe the data sources, variables, and sample.]

[FILL: Explain the analytical methods and models used.]

### Data

[FILL: Describe the dataset. Include sources, time period, and key variables.]

The following figure, generated in @notebook-01, provides an overview of the data.

{{< embed notebooks/notebook-01.ipynb#fig-sample >}}

@tbl-summary reports summary statistics by region.

{{< embed notebooks/notebook-01.ipynb#tbl-summary >}}

### Methods

[FILL: Describe the econometric or statistical methods.]

## Results and discussion {#sec-results}

[FILL: Present and interpret the main findings.]

[FILL: Discuss implications and compare with existing literature.]

## Concluding remarks {#sec-conclusion}

[FILL: Summarize the main findings and their implications.]

[FILL: Discuss limitations and directions for future research.]

## Acknowledgments {.appendix}

[FILL: Acknowledge funding sources, collaborators, and data providers.]

## Data and code availability {.appendix}

The data and code used in this study are available at [FILL: repository URL].

## References {.unnumbered}
